'''Docking Bay 92''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] located behind [[Spacers Row/Legends|Spacers Row]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was owned by the [[Human/Legends|Human]], [[Dom Antyll]]. The bay was used almost exclusively for starship repairs as Dom was a skilled mechanic who kept his tools in Docking Bay 92.<ref name="GG7" />

==History==
In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar's]] ship—the [[Outrider/Legends|''Outrider'']]—was berthed there.
